table_status.assessment: 24-entry landmine reference table exists and is largely consistent with repo guardrails.
table_status.noted_inconsistency: Landmine #21 is defined as monitor-pane failure in table, but an inline launcher comment tags a different concern as #21 (skills/SKILL.md:393-396).

implementation_references: skills/SKILL.md inline landmine tags across orchestration steps
agents/stampede-commander.agent.md depth guard and launch-proof constraints
bin/stampede.sh runtime validations and teardown safeguards

mitigations.summary: All 24 landmines in the reference table have explicit mitigation text; additional enforcement appears in agents and launcher scripts.

documentation_gaps: README.md does not mention 24-landmine awareness or point to SKILL.md table.
AGENTS.md includes constraints but lacks explicit reference to the 24-landmine table.
Install flow does not verify/announce preservation of landmine constraints.

indirect_coverage: tests/smoke-test.sh checks run_id format, directory creation, Python JSON writing, atomic claim/write patterns
tests/depth-guard-lint.sh checks leaf-node no-spawn/no-task invariants and commander depth-guard fields
coverage_gaps: No explicit automated verification for every one of the 24 landmines
